title: Cookie policy
description: Use of essential cookies and optional measurement with consent.
heading: Cookie policy
summary: Essential cookies support security and operations. Optional measurement depends on consent.

highlights.title: They preserve the minimum continuity of the site and booking.
highlights.body: Without them, parts of booking, support, or security may degrade.

highlights.title: Measurement exists to understand usage and improve the experience.
highlights.body: It is enabled through consent and does not replace clinical judgement.

sections.title: Essential cookies
sections.body: They support consent persistence, loaded resources, and technical continuity of the site.

sections.title: Preference management
sections.body: You can modify preferences from the banner or your browser.
items: Review this policy when the site changes.
